rows.label: qev025602_MSG0005
rows.name:
Aaah!
My beloved Aphrodite gets damaged,
and then some weird Ma-non pesters me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025602_MSG0006
rows.name:
What the hell is going on?!
What did I even do wrong?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025602_MSG0007
rows.name:
...Hm? Who are you?
Don't tell me you're here to rub me the wrong way too?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025602_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: qev025602_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask about the cause of his anger.

rows.label: qev025602_JNK0020
rows.name: Soothe

rows.label: qev025602_SEL0021
rows.name: Gently calm down the furious Christopher.

rows.label: qev025602_MSG0008
rows.name:
Hmph... You seem like someone
I can actually talk to...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025602_MSG0009
rows.name:
I was making full use of my prized Doll...
Aphrodite, to spectacularly exterminate native creatures, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025602_MSG0010
rows.name:
Just recently, I got slammed incredibly hard by a Rowdy Hippo,
and my front armor plating got completely mangled![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025602_MSG0011
rows.name:
Aaah! Just remembering it pisses me off!
That is the culmination of my aesthetic!
For it to be soiled by something like that...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025602_MSG0012
rows.name:
How am I supposed to stay calm?!
My prized Doll...
Aphrodite was soiled, you hear me?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025602_MSG0013
rows.name:
Aaah!
Just remembering it pisses me off![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025602_MSG0014
rows.name:
To have the culmination of my aesthetic damaged by a clunky
native creature like a Rowdy Hippo...
No matter how you look at it, it's unbearable, isn't it?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025602_MSG0015
rows.name: Aaaaaaah! It pisses me off so much!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025602_MSG0042
rows.name:
If I could at least dish out some punishment to that Rowdy Hippo
on Sickle Rock Rise, this awful feeling might settle down, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025602_MSG0016
rows.name:
My Doll is totally wrecked and won't move!
Aaah! Goddess of Beauty!
Please punish that filthy beast![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025602_MSG0017
rows.name:
Aaaaaah! Just recalling the ugly sight of that Rowdy Hippo
strutting around Sickle Rock Rise makes me so angry my hair could stand on end![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025602_MSG0018
rows.name:
...Well, since my artificial body has been permanently, coolly unhaired,
I don't actually have any hair to stand on end, though![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025602_MSG0019
rows.name:
Damn you, Rowdy Hippo...!
If Aphrodite could move, I'd exterminate you right this second![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025602_MSG0020
rows.name:
Aaah! At this rate, I'm going to lose my mind from anger!
What am I supposed to do?! Tell me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025602_JNK0030
rows.name: Inform

rows.label: qev025602_SEL0031
rows.name: Tell him you defeated the Rowdy Hippo.

rows.label: qev025602_JNK0040
rows.name: Mock

rows.label: qev025602_SEL0041
rows.name: Tease him half-jokingly.

rows.label: qev025602_MSG0021
rows.name:
...Eh? What was that?
You defeated it for me?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025602_MSG0022
rows.name:
Is that true?!
...I see, you're a BLADE too, aren't you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025602_MSG0023
rows.name:
Gwah?!
Wh-... what are you doing?!
What do you hope to achieve by provoking me?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025602_MSG0024
rows.name:
Aaaaah! May death be dealt equally
to all those who defy aesthetics!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025602_MSG0025
rows.name: Aah... The value of "Anger" is rising to the meter's limit, isn't it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025602_MSG0026
rows.name:
While this measurement result is also extremely useful,
please pacify this person's anger for now.
I'm counting on you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025602_MSG0027
rows.name:
Oh, what a wonderful person you are...
To think this Ma-non would lead me to you,
it's almost unbelievable...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025602_MSG0028
rows.name:
Phew... As long as that thing got its just deserts,
I'm satisfied...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025602_MSG0029
rows.name:
Now all that's left is to beautifully resurrect
my beloved Aphrodite...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025602_MSG0030
rows.name:
Ooh!
You have successfully pacified this person's anger![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025602_MSG0031
rows.name:
I see... So this is "Anger," is it.
Earthlings really do possess an aspect akin to a beast, don't they.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025602_MSG0032
rows.name:
We've collected good data.
Now, I've got my eye on the next sample,
so please come this way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025602_MSG0033
rows.name:
I feel like that weird Ma-non
just called me a beast, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025602_MSG0034
rows.name:
...Just my imagination, right?
Me, a beast... Haha...
My skin care routine is flawless, so surely not.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025602_MSG0035
rows.name:
Aphrodite's repairs are going smoothly!
I'll be back in action soon, and I'll deliver an aesthetic strike
right to those ugly native creatures.[ST:wait ]
